mechanics: Opens with a 3-hit ground slam chain — use a Warden in slot 1 to absorb all hits
At 50% HP gains Holy Shield aura that blocks 30% of damage — Dark-element attackers strip it 2× faster
Combo finisher targets the lowest-HP ally — keep everyone above 35% HP before his turn
Phase 2 (≤30% HP): attack speed doubles — activate your team's timed-buff skills now
Spawns 2 spider adds at 70% HP — kill adds immediately or they stack poison every 5 seconds
Web ground attack covers 60% of arena — dash-dodge through it or use a poison-immune character
At 40% HP the queen retreats to the ceiling and shoots projectiles — switch to ranged skill characters
Adds respawn every 30 seconds if the main boss is still above 20% HP — burst the boss down
Earth element — Wind and Ice characters deal 30% bonus damage throughout the whole fight
Stomp AoE covers a 6-meter radius — dash to arena edge when the slam animation begins
Summons earth pillars at 75% HP that block projectiles — reposition behind them for ranged attacks
Weak point (glowing core) exposed for 8 seconds during post-stomp recovery — use this window for burst
Classic Red Demon — Fire attacker with high base damage, Ice and Holy characters deal bonus damage
Hellfire AoE at 70% HP coats half the floor — move to the unlit half immediately
Demonic Wrath buff at 50% HP raises attack by 40% — use a Dispel skill or burst it down within 15 seconds
Regenerates 2% HP per 10 seconds above 30% HP — do not let the fight drag beyond 3 minutes
Heavy melee attacker — Warden in slot 1 absorbs the bulk of damage and should be your highest-geared character
Chain grab at 80% HP stuns one character for 5 seconds — have a CC-break or Purify skill ready
Rage mode at 50% HP: ground pounds ignore block — you must dodge through the animation, not block
Regenerates 3% HP every 10 seconds — sustained burst DPS required, do not pace your skill usage
Multiple undead wave encounters before the final boss — heal between waves or enter the final phase at 70%+ HP
Final boss applies Dark Curse: reduces max HP by 20% per stack (up to 3 stacks)
Purify or Cleanse skills remove the curse — bring at least one character with this skill type
Wave adds have high Holy resistance — avoid pure Holy attackers during the wave phase
Timespace boss — available on a fixed schedule, limited to 3 daily attempts
Dark-element attacks ignore standard DEF — HP shields and barrier skills are more effective than DEF gear
Darkness field at 60% HP reduces all character accuracy by 30% — Holy-element characters are unaffected
Seal attack silences one character for 12 seconds — keep a second Supporter available as a backup healer
Fire breath targets all characters — Ice-element accessories and characters are BiS here for the damage bonus
Periodic AoE eruption at 60% and 30% HP — activate your barrier or shielding skills 5 seconds beforehand
Tail swipe staggers front-row characters — keep your Warden in slot 1 with max HP gear
Enrages at 25% HP: all attacks gain +50% damage for 15 seconds — save your strongest burst skills for this window
Giant construct — wide-sweeping melee attacks hit the whole front row, position your Warden at slot 1
Rock-fall AoE: watch shadow indicators on the ground and step out before impact
At 60% HP activates a full-arena stomp — only airborne characters or those with dodge frames avoid it
Core weak point opens for 8 seconds after each stomp — focus your burst skills on this window only
Mine cave-in mechanic: environmental debris deals continuous party-wide damage — kill adds fast to reduce pressure
Boss has dual Earth and Thunder resistance — Wind-element characters are the best DPS here
Toxic gas at 50% HP poisons the entire party — use a Cleanse skill or bring poison-resistance accessories
Explosive ore adds spawn periodically and must be killed within a 5-second fuse or they deal 40% party HP
Poison pools persist on the arena floor throughout the fight — movement and positioning are critical every second
Tongue attack grabs one character and deals 50% max HP — Warden in slot 1 should intercept this
At 40% HP spawns 3 poisonous toad adds — kill them immediately or they stack poison across the party
Thunder-element characters have innate poison resistance and are strongly preferred here
Timespace boss — Holy Knight with fast combo strings, limited daily attempts
Holy Blade skill pierces through warden shields — use evasion-based defenders or dodge-roll through it
Summons Holy Knight adds at 60% HP — adds buff Marmas' attack speed by 20% each while alive, kill them first
Phase 2 at 35% HP activates Divine Armor: reduces damage taken by 50% — use Debuff skills to strip the armor before bursting
World boss — bring a full party, solo attempts above Normal difficulty are not viable
Dark curse stacks reduce all healing by 10% per stack (up to 5 stacks) — dispel immediately
Counter window after each major attack is the primary DPS opportunity — time your burst skills here
Fire and Holy characters deal bonus damage — bring at least 2 characters of either element
Multi-phase dragon fight: each phase shifts the dominant element — bring characters that cover Fire and Ice
Wing gust at full HP disorients the camera angle — stabilise with a Holy-buff character before the phase
Breath attack cycles Fire/Ice/Thunder with a 20-second warning animation — pre-buff the matching resistance
Tail whip at 30% HP deals ~80% of max HP — keep your healer alive above all other priorities
Stinger tail attack applies Paralysis — bring paralysis-resist accessories or an immunity-buff character
Periodic sandstorm reduces all character accuracy by 25% — use high base hit-rate characters
At 50% HP the stinger tail detaches as a second enemy — defeat the tail first or it continues to apply Paralysis
Earth-element boss — Ice and Wind characters deal bonus damage throughout; avoid Thunder-element characters
Dual boss fight — the hardest encounter currently available, do not attempt below 75% BiS on your recommended team
Red Demon applies Burn, Gray Demon applies Darkness — do not let both debuffs stack on the same character
Both bosses attack simultaneously — your Warden must be able to hold aggro against two independent threat sources
At 50% HP each boss enrages and begins synergy attacks — bring one boss to 30% HP before pivoting to the other
Recommended: Holy healer (counters Darkness), Ice attacker (bonus damage to both bosses)
